meta.title: Contact Us
meta.description: Get in touch with the MonkeyTravel team. We read every message and reply within 1 business day.

hero.title: Talk to a human
hero.subtitle: Press, partnerships, support, or just saying hi — drop us a line and we'll come back within one business day.

form.name: Your name
form.messagePlaceholder: Tell us a bit more — links, screenshots, anything that helps.
form.successBody: Thanks — we received your note and will reply within one business day.
form.errorBody: We couldn't send your message. Please try again or email us directly at support@monkeytravel.app.
form.rateLimited: Too many messages from this connection. Please try again in an hour.
form.validationMessage: Please write a message of at least 10 characters.
